entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
This is the introduction to my blog. I plan to use this site to publish projects I’ve worked on, as well as personal thoughts on various topics. Most of what I post will pertain to at least one of programming, Language and linguistics, or whatever has captured my interest at the moment.

My first few posts are going to be reflections from my Summer spent learning about linguistic fieldwork in small communities of Scotland.

- Emery
